title: Halla Hrund Logadóttir on Office Hours Podcast
summary: Halla Hrund Logadóttir, former director of the Iceland School of Energy at Reykjavík University and co-founder of the Belfer Center’s Arctic Initiative, speaks with Aroop Mukharji about the future of the Arctic region, sustainability in Iceland, and how Icelanders get their names.

_list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: The article is a metadata listing for a podcast episode featuring Halla Hrund Logadóttir, published by the Arctic Initiative. It provides contextual links to related content on Arctic governance, including a workshop report on Arctic Ocean governance, an article on the geopolitics of rare earth elements in the Arctic, and a presentation on governing solar radiation management. The core focus is on policy and research outputs from the initiative concerning environmental and geopolitical challenges in the Arctic region, framed within the broader topics of Environment & Climate Change.
result.main_content_zh: 本文是北极倡议（Arctic Initiative）发布的播客节目元数据列表，该节目特邀嘉宾为Halla Hrund Logadóttir。页面提供了相关内容的链接，包括一份关于北极海洋治理的研讨会报告、一篇关于北极稀土元素地缘政治的文章，以及一场关于管理太阳辐射以应对北极快速变化的演讲。核心内容聚焦于该倡议在北极环境与地缘政治挑战方面的政策研究成果，主题归属于环境与气候变化范畴。
